violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to register an employee certified in food safety with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment is to add an indicating symbol to menus notifying consumers as to which food items are available raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the kitchen prep unit and 2-door reach-in #2. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The frp paneling on the wall above the stovetop was observed separated from the subpaneling and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to complete food safety manager training and renew license with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

Cachupa, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Establishment is to use ice baths and shallow pans moving forward. Cachupa was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
The hood system was observed with an accumulation of grease. The hood system needs to be serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
